task_completion.description: Fiji is open and the time-lapse dataset is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji application window is visible with an image sequence of cells (nuclei) loaded.

task_completion.description: A line is drawn on the image to define the migration path for the kymograph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line selection (straight or segmented) is visible on the cell image in Fiji, appearing reasonably long (to satisfy the 200-pixel requirement).

task_completion.description: A kymograph is generated from the image sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new image window in Fiji showing a kymograph (an x-t plot with diagonal streaks representing moving cells).

task_completion.description: The kymograph is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing 'kymograph_main.png' saved in '~/Fiji_Data/results/kymograph/'.

task_completion.description: A CSV file with velocity measurements is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal showing 'velocity_measurements.csv' in '~/Fiji_Data/results/kymograph/' with columns 'track_id' and 'velocity_um_per_hr' and at least 3 measurements.

task_completion.description: A summary report with track count and mean velocity is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing 'kymograph_report.txt' in '~/Fiji_Data/results/kymograph/' containing the number of tracks (at least 3) and the mean velocity.

integrity.description: The agent used Fiji to generate the kymograph.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Fiji menus (e.g., Image > Stacks > Reslice, or a Kymograph plugin) or tools, rather than just running a pre-written script to fake outputs.

integrity.description: The kymograph image appears to be genuinely derived from the cell dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The kymograph shows realistic cell tracks (bright streaks on a dark background) corresponding to the H2B-GFP nuclei, not a blank or generic image.

integrity.description: The calculated velocities are biologically plausible.
integrity.visual_evidence: The velocities in the CSV and report are within the expected range of 1.0 to 150.0 µm/hr, and not arbitrary or hardcoded values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: Fluo-N2DL-HeLa (HeLa cells expressing H2b-GFP). Calibration: 0.645 µm/pixel, time interval: 30 minutes (0.5 hours). Biological velocity range: 1.0 to 150.0 µm/hr. Expected mean velocity range: 5.0 to 80.0 µm/hr. Minimum tracks required: 3. Output directory: ~/Fiji_Data/results/kymograph/.
